diagrams.title: Peterson's Solution State Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows how two processes coordinate using turn and flag variables
elements: Process P0 box with flag[0] state
Process P1 box with flag[1] state
Decision diamond: if flag[1] && turn==1 then wait else enter CS
diagrams.purpose: Understand the coordination mechanism between two processes

diagrams.title: Semaphore Operations Flow
diagrams.description: Visual representation of wait() and signal() operations on semaphore
elements: wait() arrow: decrement and block if <0
signal() arrow: increment and wake if <=0
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how semaphores manage process execution and blocking

diagrams.title: Producer-Consumer Circular Buffer
diagrams.description: Bounded buffer with producer and consumer pointers
diagrams.purpose: Understand buffer management and pointer movement in synchronization

diagrams.title: Dining Philosophers Problem Layout
diagrams.description: Five philosophers around table with forks
diagrams.purpose: Visualize deadlock condition and resource dependencies
